title: Semiconductor device
abstract: A semiconductor device includes a gate structure on a substrate, in which the gate structure includes a main branch extending along a first direction on the substrate and a sub-branch extending along a second direction adjacent to the main branch. The semiconductor device also includes a first doped region overlapping the main branch and the sub-branch according to a top view and a second doped region overlapping the first doped region.
claims: 1. A semiconductor device, comprising: a gate structure on a substrate, wherein the gate structure comprises: a main branch extending along a first direction on the substrate; a sub-branch extending along a second direction adjacent to the main branch, wherein the sub-branch is a part of the gate structure; a first doped region disposed in the sub-branch, wherein a first side of the first doped region is aligned with a first side of the sub-branch along the second direction; and a source/drain region adjacent to two sides of the gate structure, wherein the first doped region overlaps the source/drain region.
